case_title: CCSF VS. EVETTE RAQUEL BREWER et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CCSF AS TO DEFENDANT BREWER, EVETTE RAQUEL CASEY, JAMES ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($100.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED SEP-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BREWER, EVETTE RAQUEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($100.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED SEP-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY, JAMES ANTHONY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SAM LAW. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SAM LAW FILED BY CCSF BREWER, EVETTE RAQUEL CASEY, JAMES ANTHONY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO EVETTE RAQUEL BREWER BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-12-2011 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASEY, JAMES ANTHONY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00, PRAYER AMENDED TO $5000.00 AS REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT EVETTE RAQUEL BREWER, AND THIS DEFENDANT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
